programmes.show_description: In order - five hours of the biggest karaoke anthems of the 70s - from Mungo Jerry and T.Rex to Abba, Blondie and Queen. Prepare to sing out loud!
60 solid hours of hips-don't-lie, glitter-won't-quit, disco-ball-spinning party brilliance. Basically, if it wiggles - it's in!
From the era of glam rock, new wave and disco, it's all the hits from just one decade - the 1970s! Platform boots and flares at the ready?
We're bringing the spring sunshine to you - 70s style! Every vid is full of outdoor fun - with Elton & ELO, David Soul & David Cassidy, Bee Gees & Boney M!
Feelgood hits from just 1 decade - the 1970s! Platform boots & flares at the ready?
2 movie soundtracks that dominated 1977 & 1978 - 13 massive anthems. You'll still know every single word!
25 singalongs made famous in the theatre, on TV & at the movies. Expect The Partridge Family, Evita & Watership Down, plus a good dollop of Bond, Grease & Saturday Night Fever!
Feelgood hits from just 1 decade - the 1970s! Platform boots & flares at the ready?

programmes.show_name: Who Had The Most Hits In The 70s?
programmes.show_description: Our special countdown of the 30 acts with the most UK Top Ten hits in the 1970s features legends like Bowie, Queen, Abba, the Bee Gees, Elton and more. But the No.1 will surprise you!
Non-stop 70s rock & power ballads - all day!
The much-missed legend with 45 minutes of his monster rock operas from the 70s to the 90s.
Non-stop 70s rock & power ballads - all day!
60 minutes of power pop and rock! Earplugs at the ready as we rewind to 1977 with Rod Stewart, Boston, Ram Jam and the Sex Pistols!
Seventies music power to play loud! Work out your speakers with some pure power pop and rock including Undertones, Elton, and the Who!
Seventies music power to play loud! Work out your speakers with some pure power pop and rock including AC/DC, Kiss and Meat Loaf!
A complete rundown of the 30 biggest selling UK singles UK for 1976 - can you believe these were all hits 50 years ago? And if you thought Abba were at number 1 - think again!
Classic hits from just 1 year - 1976!
The hottest songs from the year of a record breaking summer! Simon Bates has the soundtrack of a great 12 months in pop, including Wings, Wild Cherry & The Wurzels!
Classic hits from just 1 year - 1976!
Mark Goodier with 1976's big music award winners. What was Rolling Stone magazine's 'Best Single' and who had the 'Best Selling Song' in South Africa?
Classic hits from just 1 year - 1976!
Classic hits from just 1 year - 1975!
From the era of glam rock, new wave and disco, it's all the hits from just one decade - the 1970s! Platform boots and flares at the ready?
50 songs about brothers, sisters, mothers, fathers, boys, girls, lovers & friends. Not forgetting a Russian mystic, the inventor of the telephone & a speedy milkman!
From hippies to punk rockers, via folk, funk, soul & disco - these are the classic songs that made the 70s!
Long considered a 70s style icon himself, Tony Blackburn sails through some sensational fashions - from Elvis and The Partridge Family in 1970 to Squeeze and Gary Numan in 1979!
From hippies to punk rockers, via folk, funk, soul & disco - these are the classic songs that made the 70s!
Can you believe none of these songs reached no.1? Enjoy 6 hours of runners-up, in order, that didn't quite have what it takes. From Elvis in 1970 to Abba in 1979.
Over-bearded men and leftfield ladies - all with fabulous tunes! These are alternative hits from the West Coast, the underground and the counterculture of the 1970s.
28 hit songs, 14 top artists - one track as they were in the 60s, and another in the 70s - simple! From The Kinks to The King, John Lennon to Johnny Cash.
The ultimate band battle of all time! Back to the 60s for the birth of BritPop.
NOW 70s presents two hours of classic tunes from the decade before - the Swinging 60s. All brought to you by the man who was there - sensational Tony Blackburn!
